result:
Based on the search results, here is the compiled JSON strategy guide:

```json
{
  "boss": "Mecha Knight",
  "character": "The Silent",
  "boss_mechanics": "Mecha Knight is an Act 3 (Glory) elite with boss-level threat status. It is heavily armored and starts the fight with multiple stacks of Artifact, which completely negate incoming debuffs until all stacks are stripped. It deals powerful, high-damage attacks that require strong defensive responses every turn. As the highest-HP elite in the game, it demands very high sustained damage output. Debuff-reliant strategies are weakened until Artifact stacks are removed. The fight punishes slow or passive decks — the longer it goes, the more damage you take from its relentless heavy attacks.",
  "strategy": "Strip its Artifact stacks early by applying cheap or repeated debuffs — the Silent's Expose card is ideal as it removes all Artifact, all Block, and applies 2 Vulnerable in one play. Noxious Fumes is also excellent since it triggers Poison each turn, passively eating through Artifact stacks without costing extra cards. Once Artifact is gone, apply Weak to reduce its massive attack damage and Vulnerable to accelerate your kill speed. Prioritize high raw damage output through Shivs or Poison scaling rather than relying on slow defensive attrition. Only take this fight if your deck is fully assembled with a clear win condition and strong block generation.",
  "priority_cards": [
    "Expose (strips all Artifact and Block, applies Vulnerable)",
    "Noxious Fumes (passively strips Artifact via repeated Poison application)",
    "Acrobatics (card draw to cycle to key cards faster)",
    "Blade Dance / Cloak and Dagger (Shiv generation for fast damage)",
    "Leg Sweep (high block + Weak application once Artifact is gone)",
    "Tactician (Sly energy generation for explosive turns)",
    "Bouncing Flask (multi-target Poison to strip Artifact stacks)",
    "Footwork / Backflip (Dexterity and block to survive heavy hits)"
  ],
  "cards_to_avoid_playing": [
    "Weak-only cards before Artifact is stripped (wasted application)",
    "Low-damage single-target attacks with no secondary effect",
    "Expensive setup powers that sacrifice too much tempo early in the fight",
    "Unupgraded basic Strikes and Defends (too inefficient for Act 3 elite)"
  ],
  "hp_threshold": "50+ HP recommended. Act 3 elites are described as boss-level threats — only fight Mecha Knight if your deck is fully assembled and you have strong block generation. Rest at campfires before this fight whenever possible.",
  "potion_advice": "Use potions aggressively on Mecha Knight rather than hoarding them. Offensive potions (Attack Potion, Poison Potion, Dexterity Potion) are best used after Artifact is stripped so debuff-based potions aren't wasted. If you have a Poison Potion, consider using it early to help burn through Artifact stacks. Block Potions and Lucky Tonic should be saved for the turns where Mecha Knight telegraphs its heaviest attacks."
}
```
